title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is an innovative demo application that combines Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to generate dynamic, personalized UI elements and images for a latte art use case. The app uses agentic features and Agent-to-UI to create tailored visual content on demand based on customer preferences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a demo app that pairs Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to generate personalized UI elements and images for a latte art use case. It shows how agentic features and an Agent-to-UI approach produce tailored visual content on demand from customer preferences. The relevance lies in demonstrating how agent orchestration connects a model to a live application interface rather than just returning text. Concepts covered include agent orchestration, UI design, agentic development, and retrieval-augmented generation.
